title: Pick<T, K>
description: `Pick<{name; age; createdAt: Date; email}, 'name' | 'createdAt'>` keeps only the selected keys, resolving to `{name: string; createdAt: Date}`; the dropped `age`/`email` are not part of the resolved shape, so they are never on the wire.
notes: The kept `createdAt` Date round-trips via ISO string (JSON) / 8-byte float64 epoch (binary); the unpicked `age`/`email` are absent from the resolved type and the wire.
